# RCSService.Business.OpenURLAction.Detent

**Enumeration**

Enumeration that represents a height to apply when opening a URL.

## Declaration

```swift
enum Detent
```

## Accessing detent values

- **RCSService.Business.OpenURLAction.Detent.large**: Full screen overlay.
- **RCSService.Business.OpenURLAction.Detent.medium**: Half screen overlay.
- **RCSService.Business.OpenURLAction.Detent.mediumLarge**: Three-quarters screen overlay.

## Conforms To

- Copyable
- Decodable
- Encodable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
